prestazioni: Engine: F136 EVO 4.3L V8 (4,308cc) naturally aspirated with a custom Novitec Rosso Stage 3+ ECU reflash, optimizing ignition timing and fuel maps for 620+ HP (up from 510 HP stock) while retaining the factory 8,500 RPM redline. Includes a Novitec high-flow carbon airbox and 102mm titanium intake plenums to reduce restriction.

Exhaust: Novitec Rosso 100-cell metallic catalytic converters paired with a full titanium Akrapovič Evolution Line exhaust system, featuring 70mm diameter piping, electronically controlled valves, and a lightweight Inconel muffler core for a 12.5kg weight reduction over stock. Backpressure optimized for mid-range torque without sacrificing top-end power.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and low-speed compression), custom valved for the F430 Scuderia Spider’s 50:50 weight distribution. Includes Eibach ERS race springs (20% stiffer than OEM) and spherical bearing top mounts for precise camber/caster adjustments. Matched with a Novitec front strut brace and rear carbon fiber tower bar for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: Novitec Rosso ‘Scuderia Sportivo’ widebody kit, extending front fenders by 30mm and rear quarters by 40mm to accommodate 20x9.5 ET25 (front) and 20x11 ET35 (rear) HRE FF01 wheels with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/30 and 305/30 respectively). Includes a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing (200mm chord) for 180kg of downforce at 250 km/h.

Body: Full GTSport carbon fiber body conversion, including a one-piece front bumper, side skirts, and rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets. The hood features a functional heat extractor duct (replacing the OEM NACA duct) and is secured with titanium hood pins. Painted in Ferrari ‘Rosso Scuderia’ with a 3M Matte Clear Bra PPF wrap for rock chip protection.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, replacing the OEM carbon-Kevlar seats. The roll cage is a custom Matter Italy bolt-in cage (chrome-moly steel, 45mm diameter) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Steering wheel is a MOMO Mod.70 carbon fiber unit with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display.
